title: [Bug] experimental_mutable_object_manager.cc -  Check failed: RAY_PREDICT_TRUE(_left_ != _right_)  0 vs 0

labels.name: bug
labels.description: Something that is supposed to be working; but isn't

labels.name: P1
labels.description: Issue that should be fixed within a few weeks

labels.name: core
labels.description: Issues that should be addressed in Ray Core

labels.name: contribution-welcome
labels.description: Community contributions for this issue will be welcomed and prioritized for review.

body:
### What happened + What you expected to happen

## Hardware

2x DGX Sparks

## Software

See Reproduction script

## Error

The application starts successfully, when using `curl` to communicate to the app, the following error appears.

```
...
(APIServer pid=1) INFO:     Application startup complete.
(EngineCore pid=107) INFO 04-03 12:10:43 [ray_executor.py:561] RAY_CGRAPH_get_timeout is set to 300
(EngineCore pid=107) INFO 04-03 12:10:43 [ray_executor.py:565] VLLM_USE_RAY_COMPILED_DAG_CHANNEL_TYPE = nccl
(EngineCore pid=107) INFO 04-03 12:10:43 [ray_executor.py:569] VLLM_USE_RAY_COMPILED_DAG_OVERLAP_COMM = False
(EngineCore pid=107) INFO 04-03 12:10:43 [ray_executor.py:634] Using Ray's NCCL communicator for Ray Compiled Graph communication.
[2026-04-03 12:10:44,576 C 107 107] experimental_mutable_object_manager.cc:177:  An unexpected system state has occurred. You have likely discovered a bug in Ray. Please report this issue at https://github.com/ray-project/ray/issues and we'll work with you to fix it. Check failed: RAY_PREDICT_TRUE(_left_ != _right_)  0 vs 0
*** StackTrace Information ***
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(+0x15e60b8) [0xfb07839560b8] ray::operator<<()
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(_ZN3ray6RayLogD1Ev+0x5d8) [0xfb0783958b58] ray::RayLog::~RayLog()
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(_ZN3ray12experimental20MutableObjectManager14OpenSemaphoresERKNS_8ObjectIDEPNS_18PlasmaObjectHeaderE+0x574) [0xfb0782d7ba54] ray::experimental::MutableObjectManager::OpenSemaphores()
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(_ZN3ray12experimental20MutableObjectManager15RegisterChannelERKNS_8ObjectIDESt10unique_ptrIN6plasma13MutableObjectESt14default_deleteIS7_EEb+0xb4) [0xfb0782d7d3f4] ray::experimental::MutableObjectManager::RegisterChannel()
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(_ZN3ray4core12experimental21MutableObjectProvider21RegisterReaderChannelERKNS_8ObjectIDE+0x78) [0xfb0782d71a48] ray::core::experimental::MutableObjectProvider::RegisterReaderChannel()
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(_ZN3ray4core10CoreWorker39ExperimentalRegisterMutableObjectReaderERKNS_8ObjectIDE+0x20) [0xfb0782d006a0] ray::core::CoreWorker::ExperimentalRegisterMutableObjectReader()
/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/ray/_raylet.so(+0x8d7000) [0xfb0782c47000] __pyx_pw_3ray_7_raylet_10CoreWorker_49experimental_channel_register_reader()
VLLM::EngineCore(PyObject_Vectorcall+0x4c) [0x4ce52c] PyObject_Vectorcall
VLLM::EngineCore(_PyEval_EvalFrameDefault+0x67c) [0x4b2fdc] _PyEval_EvalFrameDefault
VLLM::EngineCore(PyEval_EvalCode+0x84) [0x5a0f44] PyEval_EvalCode
VLLM::EngineCore() [0x5f0c0c]
VLLM::EngineCore() [0x5e97e8]
VLLM::EngineCore(PyRun_StringFlags+0x70) [0x5e3830] PyRun_StringFlags
VLLM::EngineCore(PyRun_SimpleStringFlags+0x40) [0x5e3530] PyRun_SimpleStringFlags
VLLM::EngineCore(Py_RunMain+0x404) [0x5df734] Py_RunMain
VLLM::EngineCore(Py_BytesMain+0x24) [0x5856f4] Py_BytesMain
/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6(+0x27400) [0xfb0948527400]
/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6(__libc_start_main+0x98) [0xfb09485274d8] __libc_start_main
VLLM::EngineCore(_start+0x30) [0x585570] _start

(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [core_client.py:667] Engine core proc EngineCore died unexpectedly, shutting down client.
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707] AsyncLLM output_handler failed.
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707] Traceback (most recent call last):
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707]   File "/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/vllm/v1/engine/async_llm.py", line 663, in output_handler
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707]     outputs = await engine_core.get_output_async()
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707]               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707]   File "/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py", line 985, in get_output_async
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707]     raise self._format_exception(outputs) from None
(APIServer pid=1) ERROR 04-03 12:10:44 [async_llm.py:707] vllm.v1.engine.exceptions.EngineDeadError: EngineCore encountered an issue. See stack trace (above) for the root cause.
(APIServer pid=1) INFO:     192.168.10.1:56784 - "POST /v1/chat/completions HTTP/1.1" 500 Internal Server Error
(APIServer pid=1) INFO:     Shutting down
(APIServer pid=1) INFO:     Waiting for application shutdown.
(APIServer pid=1) INFO:     Application shutdown complete.
(APIServer pid=1) INFO:     Finished server process [1]
```

## What I already tried

Differnt types of ENV variables. Also all variations of `VLLM_USE_RAY_COMPILED_DAG_CHANNEL_TYPE`. Also various docker things, but I think its not related to this issue.

### Used Images:

`vllm/vllm-openai:v0.19.0`
`vllm/vllm-openai:v0.18.1`
`vllm/vllm-openai:nightly`
`nvcr.io/nvidia/vllm:26.03-py3`
`nvcr.io/nvidia/vllm:26.02-py3`


## Disclaimer

Maybe, I miss something or I am just dumb and dont know how to deactivate the experimental_mutable_object_manager.

### Versions / Dependencies

Ray - experimental_mutable_object_manager.cc:177

### Reproduction script

Spark1:
```
docker run -dit  \
	--name ray \
	--gpus all \
	--shm-size=16GB  \
	--net=host   \
	-e GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e TP_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e VLLM_HOST_IP=192.168.10.1 \
	-e VLLM_USE_RAY_WRAPPED_PP_COMM=0 \
	-e RAY_memory_usage_threshold=1.0 \
	-e RAY_memory_monitor_refresh_ms=0 \
	-v ./models/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
	-v /tmp/ray:/tmp/ray \
	--privileged \
	--entrypoint /bin/bash \
	vllm/vllm-openai:v0.19.0 -c "pip install ray cupy-cuda12x && ray start --head --block --port=6379 --node-ip-address=192.168.10.1" 
```

Spark2:
```
docker run -dit --rm  \
	--name ray \
	--gpus all \
	--shm-size=16GB  \
	--net=host   \
	-e GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e TP_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e VLLM_HOST_IP=192.168.10.2 \
	-e VLLM_USE_RAY_WRAPPED_PP_COMM=0 \
	-e RAY_memory_usage_threshold=1.0 \
	-e RAY_memory_monitor_refresh_ms=0 \
	-v ./models/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
	--entrypoint /bin/bash \
	--privileged \
	vllm/vllm-openai:v0.19.0  -c "pip install ray cupy-cuda12x && ray start --block --node-ip-address=192.168.10.2 --address=192.168.10.1:6379" 
``` 

Application (Spark1):

```
docker run -it --rm  \
	--net=host --gpus all \
	-e VLLM_HOST_IP=192.168.10.1 \
	-e VLLM_USE_RAY_WRAPPED_PP_COMM=0 \
	-e VLLM_USE_RAY_COMPILED_DAG_CHANNEL_TYPE=nccl \
	-e VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING=0 \
	-e NCCL_IB_HCA=rocep1s0f0,rocep1s0f1 \
	-e NCCL_IB_GID_INDEX=3 \
	-e NCCL_DEBUG=INFO \
	-e NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e TP_SOCKET_IFNAME=enp1s0f0np0 \
	-e RAY_ADDRESS=192.168.10.1:6379 \
	-v /tmp/ray:/tmp/ray \
	-v ./../ray/models/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
	--entrypoint /bin/bash  \
	vllm/vllm-openai:v0.19.0 -c "pip install ray cupy-cuda12x && python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B --distributed-executor-backend ray --tensor-parallel-size 2 --max-model-len 8192 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.8 --trust-remote-code --enforce-eager"
```

### Issue Severity

High: It blocks me from completing my task.
